title: Farcr's Better Dirt
description: Significantly improves the game's most iconic block: Dirt!
body:
![Farcr's Better Dirt Banner](https://i.imgur.com/kcTcFi9.png)

## About
A small Pack that improves dirt, grass and all related blocks through multiple new texture, variance, tiling issue fixes, lowered contrast and much, much more! - suggestions and bug reports are always welcome!

## Support
Click on the logo below to support the project through ko-fi:

[![Ko-Fi][1]][2]

[1]:  https://i.imgur.com/kRJl5Uj.png
[2]:  https://ko-fi.com/farcr "Ko-Fi"
